description: Accessing fields from a composite type column — fields are nullable even if composite is NOT NULL

columns.name: street
columns.note: Composite fields are nullable by default even if composite itself is NOT NULL

columns.name: city
columns.note: Composite fields are nullable by default even if composite itself is NOT NULL

name: cast_composite_field_access
schema_sql: CREATE TYPE address AS (street TEXT, city TEXT, zip TEXT);
CREATE TABLE contacts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, home_address address NOT NULL);
